title: Spatial Inequalities in PM2.5 Exposure and Income Inequality in California Counties (2019)
intent: To understand the relationship between spatial inequalities in PM2.5 exposure and income inequality across California counties and investigate how this relationship varies by urban-rural classification.
data_requirement: PM2.5 exposure data for California counties for the year 2019
Income inequality data represented by the Gini coefficient for California counties for the year 2019
Urban-rural classification data for each county in California
data_available_sufficiency: The data provided is empty, hence not sufficient to address the research question.
data_requests: Annual PM2.5 concentration data for California counties for 2019 from EPA AQS
Gini coefficient data for California counties for 2019 from the U.S. Census Bureau
Urban-rural classification data for California counties from the U.S. Department of Agriculture for 2019
County boundary shapefile for California, 2019, from US Census TIGER/Line
